column1: # XPredict — OWASP ZAP baseline rule-action file (SC#4, Phase 11).

column3: <comment>   (TAB-separated; ZAP requires literal TABs).

column1: # action ∈ { WARN, IGNORE, FAIL }. Default action for any unlisted rule is WARN.
# Intent: keep the security-scan ZAP gate HIGH-only so the green CI base is not
# broken on day one (RESEARCH Anti-Patterns / Pitfall 2). The baseline is PASSIVE
# and UNAUTHENTICATED. It primarily exercises the public market routes and the
# /auth/forgot-password). The rows below IGNORE the non-actionable informational
# passive alerts a baseline scan always emits against a JSON API so they cannot
# fail the build; genuine HIGH-risk findings are NOT suppressed and still gate.
# DEFERRAL (Pitfall 3 / RESEARCH A4): authenticated /bets/* DAST traversal is a
# v2 item. /bets/* is cookie-auth-gated; an unauthenticated baseline spider sees
# 401/403 there. We accept baseline (public + auth-endpoint) coverage now and
# defer authenticated DAST (requires new ZAP auth-context infra, out of scope).
# This list is the INITIAL SEED — tune it against the first real scan report.
# --- Non-actionable passive informational alerts (IGNORE: never fail the build) ---

column3: Re-examine Cache-control Directives (informational; JSON API)
Content-Type Header Missing (low/info on non-HTML responses)
Missing Anti-clickjacking / X-Frame-Options Header (N/A for a JSON API, no frames)
X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing (informational on JSON API)
Information Disclosure - Debug Error Messages (passive; triage HIGH separately)
Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL (informational)
Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments (informational source-comment heuristic)
Server Leaks Information via X-Powered-By / Server header (low; hardening, not HIGH)
Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set (N/A for a non-HTML JSON API)
Storable and Cacheable Content (informational caching heuristic)
Retrieved from Cache (informational)
Cookie Without SameSite Attribute (auth cookies set SameSite; baseline false-positive surface)
Permissions Policy Header Not Set (browser-policy header; N/A for a JSON API)
Timestamp Disclosure - Unix (informational regex match on numeric IDs/timestamps)
Modern Web Application (informational classification, not a vulnerability)
Dangerous JS Functions (informational JS heuristic)
Sec-Fetch-* Fetch Metadata Request Headers (informational)
Loosely Scoped Cookie (informational cookie-scope heuristic)

column1: # --- 401/403 noise on auth-gated routes the unauthenticated spider cannot enter (Pitfall 3) ---

column3: Weak Authentication Method (baseline cannot authenticate; /bets/* DAST deferred to v2)
